runtime_thought.image-hint: close-up of a foam edge catching harsh light, impossible to unsee
runtime_thought.residue-summary: The seams remain visible and undeniable; rationalization offers no real shelter from what he now perceives.
runtime_thought.thought-beat-text: The seams won't blur back into seamlessness no matter how he frames it—he's seen the foam-core, the fingerprint, the stage light catching the edge. He tries to rationalize it away as nothing, just texture, just the way things are made, but the honesty of that observation sits in his chest like something he swallowed and can't digest.
runtime_thought.audio-hint: low frequency hum with sharp, exposed high-end frequencies breaking through

s1_seeing_through.description: Snake notices the seams. The foam-core edge. The fingerprint in the clay. He can't unsee it but he can't say it.

s2_the_mission.description: The mission is urgent. The timer is real. The explosives are real. But the mission is happening inside a model.

s3_the_edge.description: The wall is also the edge of the set. Beyond it there is no geography, only backstage. Escape is stepping into nothing.

s4_the_ring.description: The wrestling ring. The only honest place. Here, performance is the stated purpose. Everywhere else it's a secret.

runtime_thought.image-hint: eyes fixed on the foam-core edge, fingers tightening, light catching the exact place where the illusion breaks
runtime_thought.residue-summary: The seams are now undeniable and active; rationalization has failed to seal them, leaving only the choice between speaking the truth or maintaining the performance.
runtime_thought.thought-beat-text: He knows the seam is real—the fingerprint, the stage light catching the edge—and no story he tells himself will fold it back into seamlessness. The wall between seeing and speaking grows thinner, more unbearable with each moment he stays silent at the checkpoint.
runtime_thought.audio-hint: shallow breath held, a faint crackle like paper under pressure, silence that has weight

runtime_thought.residue-summary: The reversal has locked: Snake now sees himself as inhabitant of the stage rather than its master, and the fingerprint has become undeniable evidence that demands either speech or deeper burial.

runtime_thought.thought-beat-text: The countdown is real—he can feel it in his chest, each second a small collapse—but the mission itself is a rehearsal, a performance of urgency happening inside something that isn't quite real.
